scripts.build: npm run build -w caelus && npm run stats:golden && npm run facts:sync && npm run build -w caelus-delineations-pd && npm run build -w caelus-mcp && npm run build -w caelus-birth && npm run build -w caelus-wheel && npm run docs:api && npm run search:index && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w caelus && npm run test -w caelus-delineations-pd
scripts.test:web: export NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-ci; npm run build -w caelus-mcp && npm run docs:api && npm run search:index && npm run build -w web && npm run smoke:web
scripts.preflight: npm run check:versions && npm run test && npm run lint:prose && npm run lint:emdash && npm run facts:sync && npm run lint:claims && npm run test:web
